name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for CrossTide
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the problem or use case.

## Proposed solution

Describe your proposed solution.

## Affected layers

- [ ] Domain (pure calculators - SMA, EMA, RSI, MACD, consensus)
- [ ] Core (state, cache, config, fetch)
- [ ] UI (router, theme, views, CSS)
- [ ] Types (shared interfaces)

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you have considered.

## Additional context

Any other relevant information, mockups, or references.
